name: MYRadiologyImplementationGuide
title: Malaysian National Radiology Interoperability And Conformance Guide
publisher: Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia

contact.name: Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia
Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia

description: Draft national FHIR R4 radiology implementation guide for Malaysia, aligned to the national MY Core baseline and published as the computable core of a wider one-repository radiology conformance specification.

grouping.name: FHIR Profiles
grouping.description: Core Malaysian radiology profiles that define the computable exchange layer for order, workflow, scheduling, procedure, study, report, document sharing, provenance, and audit.

grouping.name: Terminology Artefacts
grouping.description: Value sets and code systems that support workflow states, accession policy options, modality coding, procedure coding, report coding, structured findings, and document-sharing metadata.

grouping.name: Capability Statements
grouping.description: Actor-specific conformance expectations for order placers, workflow managers, archives, viewers, document-sharing actors, and validation participants.

grouping.name: Naming Systems
grouping.description: PROVISIONAL naming system resources that distinguish placeholder identifier URIs from value format, issuing authority, and future governance decisions.

grouping.name: Examples
grouping.description: Worked examples that illustrate the expected JSON and XML payload shape for profiles, transaction patterns, errors, document submission, and direct retrieval workflows.

grouping.name: Concept Maps
grouping.description: Starter mapping artefacts that explain how the provisional procedure catalogue aligns to external coding systems used by implementation partners.

grouping.name: Operations
grouping.description: Optional operations retained for explicit partner patterns where standard search and read remains the national baseline.

resource.name: Accession Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for accession identifiers using the nationally reserved accession namespace root and the recommended sandbox draft value pattern.

resource.name: Document Unique ID Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for XDS or MHD document unique identifiers.

resource.name: Encounter Example
resource.description: Shared encounter context used by the workflow examples.

resource.name: Facility Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for facility identifiers.

resource.name: Healthcare Worker Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for healthcare worker identifiers.

resource.name: HIS Order Placer Capability Statement
resource.description: Client capability expectations for a HIS or CPOE partner placing radiology orders and reading downstream workflow and shared-document information.

resource.name: IHE MHD DesignationType Extension
resource.description: Local placeholder definition for the IHE MHD designationType extension, retained using the published IHE canonical URL so that validation can proceed in environments where the upstream package is not resolvable.

resource.name: IHE MHD SourceId Extension
resource.description: Local placeholder definition for the IHE MHD sourceId extension, retained using the published IHE canonical URL so that validation can proceed in environments where the upstream package is not resolvable.

resource.name: IMPACS RIS Sync Operation
resource.description: OPTIONAL RadioConnect direct-RIS retrieval operation retained as a supported partner pattern.

resource.name: Invalid ServiceRequest OperationOutcome Example
resource.description: Example rejection response showing how validation errors should be communicated to implementation partners.

resource.name: Location Example
resource.description: Example imaging location used for scheduling and direct retrieval context.

resource.name: MHD AuditEvent Example
resource.description: Example audit record for a successful ITI-65 Provide Document Bundle transaction.

resource.name: MHD Document Recipient Capability Statement
resource.description: Server capability expectations for the FHIR document gateway or registry that receives and serves MHD content.

resource.name: MHD Document Source Capability Statement
resource.description: Client capability expectations for systems that submit radiology documents through IHE MHD.

resource.name: MHD DocumentReference Example
resource.description: Example radiology report document populated with MHD and XDS-aligned metadata.

resource.name: MHD Provide Document Bundle Example
resource.description: Example ITI-65 transaction bundle containing a SubmissionSet, DocumentReference, and Binary payload.

resource.name: MHD Report Binary Example
resource.description: Example Binary resource representing packaged report content in a Provide Document Bundle.

resource.name: MHD Submission Set Example
resource.description: Example SubmissionSet List used in an ITI-65 Provide Document Bundle.

resource.name: MY Core Amended Reason Extension Placeholder
resource.description: Local compatibility placeholder for the MY Core amended-reason extension referenced by the published MY Core package but not distributed in the package snapshot available to this guide.

resource.name: MY Core Attachment Boolean Extension Placeholder
resource.description: Local compatibility placeholder for the MY Core attachment-boolean extension referenced by the published MY Core package but not distributed in the package snapshot available to this guide.

resource.name: MY Core Attester Extension Placeholder
resource.description: Local compatibility placeholder for the MY Core attester extension referenced by the published MY Core package but not distributed in the package snapshot available to this guide.

resource.name: MY Core Printed Date Extension Placeholder
resource.description: Local compatibility placeholder for the MY Core printed-date extension referenced by the published MY Core package but not distributed in the package snapshot available to this guide.

resource.name: MY Core Procedure Primary Discipline Extension Placeholder
resource.description: Local compatibility placeholder for the MY Core procedure-primary-discipline extension referenced by the published MY Core package but not distributed in the package snapshot available to this guide.

resource.name: MY Core Procedure Recorded Extension Placeholder
resource.description: Local compatibility placeholder for the MY Core procedure-recorded extension referenced by the published MY Core package but not distributed in the package snapshot available to this guide.

resource.name: MY Core Procedure Session Type Extension Placeholder
resource.description: Local compatibility placeholder for the MY Core procedure-session-type extension referenced by the published MY Core package but not distributed in the package snapshot available to this guide.

resource.name: MY Core Relates-To Extension Placeholder
resource.description: Local compatibility placeholder for the MY Core relates-to extension referenced by the published MY Core package but not distributed in the package snapshot available to this guide.

resource.name: MY Core Simple Register Extension Placeholder
resource.description: Local compatibility placeholder for the MY Core simple-register extension referenced by the published MY Core package but not distributed in the package snapshot available to this guide.

resource.name: MY Radiology Accession Pattern CodeSystem
resource.description: Draft policy-option codes describing candidate accession numbering strategies.

resource.name: MY Radiology Accession Pattern ValueSet
resource.description: Candidate accession identifier patterns carried for governance and sandbox design.

resource.name: MY Radiology Appointment
resource.description: Optional booking and scheduling profile where Appointment is exposed through FHIR.

resource.name: MY Radiology Clinical Indication ValueSet
resource.description: Preferred SNOMED CT and ICD-10 coding envelope for clinical indication on radiology orders.

resource.name: MY Radiology DiagnosticReport
resource.description: Radiology report profile for preliminary, final, amended, and addendum reporting scenarios.

resource.name: MY Radiology DICOMweb Endpoint
resource.description: DICOM WADO-RS endpoint profile used by imaging study metadata publishers and retrieval consumers.

resource.name: MY Radiology Document Type ValueSet
resource.description: Document typing codes for packaged radiology reports.

resource.name: MY Radiology DocumentReference
resource.description: Document-sharing profile for packaged report exchange and IHE MHD or XDS-aligned scenarios.

resource.name: MY Radiology Finding Code ValueSet
resource.description: Placeholder structured finding envelope using SNOMED CT and LOINC.

resource.name: MY Radiology ImagingStudy
resource.description: FHIR-facing imaging study metadata aligned to the underlying DICOM study.

resource.name: MY Radiology MHD AuditEvent
resource.description: AuditEvent profile for MHD submission, query, and retrieval events.

resource.name: MY Radiology MHD Submission Set
resource.description: SubmissionSet profile used when radiology documents are submitted through IHE MHD.

resource.name: MY Radiology Modality ValueSet
resource.description: Required DICOM-aligned modality codes for imaging study publication.

resource.name: MY Radiology Observation
resource.description: Structured radiology finding or measurement profile used when narrative reporting alone is insufficient.

resource.name: MY Radiology Presented Form Content Type ValueSet
resource.description: Allowed DiagnosticReport presented-form content types for rendered report exchange.

resource.name: MY Radiology Procedure
resource.description: Performed imaging procedure profile linking the originating order to the completed act.

resource.name: MY Radiology Procedure Code Concept Map
resource.description: Starter mapping from the provisional locally hosted RadLex mirror to commonly used LOINC radiology report or procedure codes.

resource.name: MY Radiology Procedure Code ValueSet
resource.description: Extensible imaging procedure catalogue binding using a PROVISIONAL RadLex mirror strategy with starter LOINC support for direct retrieval patterns.

resource.name: MY Radiology Provenance
resource.description: Provenance profile for authorship, amendment, and publication traceability across radiology resources.

resource.name: MY Radiology Report Code ValueSet
resource.description: Starter LOINC radiology report codes for extensible diagnostic report exchange.

resource.name: MY Radiology ServiceRequest
resource.description: Radiology imaging order profile for Malaysian deployments.

resource.name: MY Radiology Task
resource.description: Workflow tracking profile for order receipt, acceptance, scheduling, progress, completion, rejection, cancellation, amendment, and report publication visibility.

resource.name: MY Radiology Task Status Reason CodeSystem
resource.description: Starter operational reasons for rejection, suspension, rescheduling, or workflow exceptions.

resource.name: MY Radiology Task Status Reason ValueSet
resource.description: Starter operational reasons for rejection, suspension, rescheduling, or workflow exceptions.

resource.name: MY Radiology Workflow State CodeSystem
resource.description: Technical workflow status codes used in Task.businessStatus.

resource.name: MY Radiology Workflow State ValueSet
resource.description: Required business status codes for radiology Task synchronisation.

resource.name: MY Radiology XDS Class Code CodeSystem
resource.description: Local classCode values for radiology document sharing.

resource.name: MY Radiology XDS Class Code ValueSet
resource.description: Required document classification codes for MHD and XDS-aligned document sharing.

resource.name: MY Radiology XDS Confidentiality ValueSet
resource.description: Required confidentiality codes for document sharing metadata.

resource.name: MY Radiology XDS Content Type CodeSystem
resource.description: Local SubmissionSet content-type values for radiology document sharing.

resource.name: MY Radiology XDS Content Type ValueSet
resource.description: Required SubmissionSet content-type codes for MHD or XDS-aligned exchange.

resource.name: MY Radiology XDS Event Code ValueSet
resource.description: Extensible event codes for document sharing, based on imaging modality.

resource.name: MY Radiology XDS Facility Type CodeSystem
resource.description: Local healthcare-facility-type values for radiology document sharing.

resource.name: MY Radiology XDS Facility Type ValueSet
resource.description: Required facility classification codes for document sharing metadata.

resource.name: MY Radiology XDS Format Code ValueSet
resource.description: Required IHE format codes for packaged radiology documents.

resource.name: MY Radiology XDS Practice Setting CodeSystem
resource.description: Local practice-setting values for radiology document sharing.

resource.name: MY Radiology XDS Practice Setting ValueSet
resource.description: Required clinical practice-setting codes for document sharing metadata.

resource.name: MY RadLex Procedure Mirror Placeholder
resource.description: PROVISIONAL placeholder code system for a future locally hosted RadLex mirror.

resource.name: Organisation Example
resource.description: Example imaging organisation used across the workflow.

resource.name: PACS Metadata Publisher Capability Statement
resource.description: Server capability expectations for a PACS or VNA partner exposing imaging metadata to FHIR consumers.

resource.name: Patient Example
resource.description: Shared patient context used by the radiology workflow examples.

resource.name: Patient Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for the future national patient identifier domain.

resource.name: Practitioner Example
resource.description: Example radiologist practitioner used across reporting and workflow examples.

resource.name: PractitionerRole Example
resource.description: Example radiologist role used as the requester in the workflow examples.

resource.name: RadioConnect Missing Accession OperationOutcome Example
resource.description: Example invariant failure response for a direct-RIS payload where study and order accession linkage is missing or inconsistent.

resource.name: RadioConnect Sync Bundle Example
resource.description: Example direct-RIS searchset bundle returned by the optional impacs-ris-sync operation.

resource.name: Radiology Appointment Example
resource.description: Example booked appointment for a scheduled radiology slot.

resource.name: Radiology DiagnosticReport Example
resource.description: Example final radiology report linked to the imaging study and structured finding.

resource.name: Radiology DICOMweb Endpoint Example
resource.description: Example WADO-RS retrieval endpoint referenced by the imaging study metadata example.

resource.name: Radiology DocumentReference Example
resource.description: Example packaged radiology report document for sharing scenarios.

resource.name: Radiology ImagingStudy Example
resource.description: Example study metadata aligned to a DICOM study and linked to the order and performed procedure.

resource.name: Radiology Observation Example
resource.description: Example structured finding used to supplement a narrative radiology report.

resource.name: Radiology Order Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for radiology order identifiers issued by order placer systems.

resource.name: Radiology Order Submission Transaction Example
resource.description: Example transaction bundle showing a realistic order-submission pattern for sandbox testing and system onboarding.

resource.name: Radiology Order Workflow Bundle Example
resource.description: Example collection bundle showing the main order-to-report workflow resources together.

resource.name: Radiology Procedure Example
resource.description: Example performed imaging procedure derived from the originating order.

resource.name: Radiology Provenance Example
resource.description: Example provenance record linking report publication responsibility to an identified Malaysian radiologist and organisation.

resource.name: Radiology Report Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for radiology report identifiers issued by reporting systems.

resource.name: Radiology ServiceRequest Example
resource.description: Example imaging order showing placer order and accession identifiers, clinical indication, requested procedure, requester context, and location.

resource.name: Radiology Task Example
resource.description: Example workflow tracking task representing an accepted and scheduled order.

resource.name: Radiology Task Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for radiology workflow task identifiers issued by workflow-managing systems.

resource.name: RIS Workflow Manager Capability Statement
resource.description: Server capability expectations for a RIS partner acting as the operational order filler, reporting authority, and optional direct retrieval endpoint.

resource.name: Validation Consumer Capability Statement
resource.description: Client capability expectations for national validation and conformance testing participants.

resource.name: Viewer Consumer Capability Statement
resource.description: Client capability expectations for an EHR, viewer, or direct retrieval partner consuming study metadata and report content.
